_meta.description: Act 3 boss fights with full move patterns and strategy from wiki
_meta.usage: Load when: planning boss fight in Act 3, asking about Act 3 bosses

bosses.name: Awakened One
mechanics: Phase 1: Gains Strength when you play Powers
Phase 2 (50% HP): Spawns Cultists, attacks more aggressively
strategy_tips: Avoid playing Powers in phase 1 if possible
Need multi-target for Cultists in phase 2
Frontload damage to minimize phase 1 Power punishment

bosses.name: Time Eater
mechanics: Ends your turn after 12 cards played
strategy_tips: Value high-impact single cards over card spam
Count cards - stop at 11 to maximize efficiency
Avoid draw-heavy decks or plan around 12-card limit

bosses.name: Donu and Deca
mechanics: Two bosses: Donu (offensive, scales) and Deca (defensive, cleanses debuffs)
strategy_tips: Kill Donu first - he scales with Strength
Debuffs on Deca are wasted (she cleanses)
Need consistent damage for both targets

bosses.name: Corrupt Heart
strategy_tips: Need huge scaling (Strength, Focus, or infinite combos)
Prioritize Spear first to reduce incoming damage
Infinite or near-infinite setups strongly recommended
